assertions.name: exactly-one-initial-state
assertions.fail_if: initial state count is zero or greater than one
assertions.fix_template: Mark only one state as initial.

assertions.name: transition-target-exists
assertions.message_template: Transition {transition} points to unknown target state {target}.
assertions.fix_template: Add the target state or fix transition.to.

assertions.name: terminal-has-no-outgoing
assertions.message_template: Terminal state {state} cannot have outgoing transition {transition}.
assertions.fix_template: Remove the outgoing transition or clear terminal=true.

assertions.name: composition-inputs-are-fsms
assertions.check: every composition input resolves to kind=fsm
assertions.fail_if: input points to a policy, artifact, context, or missing object
assertions.message_template: Composition {composition} input {input} is not an FSM.
assertions.fix_template: Reference an fsm:* object as the composition input.

assertions.name: source-location-exists
assertions.check: required traceable objects have defined_at or generated/imported provenance
assertions.fail_if: source location is missing without an explicit provenance exception
assertions.fix_template: Add defined_at or mark the object as generated/imported.

assertions.name: public-projection-no-secret
assertions.check: public projection contains no secret-bearing fields
assertions.fail_if: secret-bearing artifact, metadata, policy payload, path, or trace is exported
assertions.fix_template: Redact the field or mark the subject private/secret.

assertions.name: trace-event-maps-to-transition
assertions.check: trace event kind maps to a known transition, state, event, or artifact
assertions.fail_if: runtime event cannot be mapped to design IR
assertions.message_template: Runtime event {event_kind} cannot be mapped to design IR.
assertions.fix_template: Add a runtime event mapping or update the design IR.
